summary: The diff implements the four main requirements fairly comprehensively. REQ-1 (header restructure with five controls in order), REQ-2 (ChatbotPanel with glassmorphism, multi-language, font size, Senior Mode), REQ-3 (VoiceAssistantDropdown with Web Speech API, Royal Indigo glow, pulse animation), and REQ-4 (visual refinements, dark typography, hover animations) are all addressed. One minor gap exists: the ChatbotPanel language selector covers English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, and Tamil as required, but the Header's LanguageContext does not include Kannada, so the app-level language selector cannot drive voice operations in Kannada. The diff is truncated so complete verification of all styling details is limited.

missing_requirements.requirement: Voice operations respect the currently selected app language — Kannada is supported in VoiceAssistantDropdown's LANG_CODES but is absent from the Header's LANGUAGES array and LanguageContext Language type (which covers en, hi, mr, ta, te, bn only), so Kannada cannot be selected at the app level to drive voice operations.
missing_requirements.reason: The Header's LANGUAGES array and LanguageContext Language type do not include Kannada ('kn'), meaning a user cannot select Kannada via the app language selector to drive voice operations in that language, even though VoiceAssistantDropdown supports it internally.
